sampled_augmented_target_semantics.continued_target: max_a M(s_next,a), no extra gamma factor
sampled_augmented_target_semantics.target_comparison: sampled targets are compared to the deterministic soft marginal target computed from the sampled learner pre-update table on the same sampled original transition

environment_audit.terminal_absorbing_handling: No original RiverSwim states are terminal. Original-transition bootstraps are always active. Sampled g_plus/g_minus absorbing events do not bootstrap.
environment_audit.transition_convention: left swims deterministically left except at state 0; right swims stochastically with 0.35 right / 0.60 stay / 0.05 left in middle states, 0.40 rightward from state 0, and 0.60 stay at the right end
